raw_consumer_statement:
Hello, On XX/XX/year>, I rented a car in XXXX using XXXX. I got a confirmation ( attached ), which showed a daily rate of XXXX with XXXX XXXX totaling XXXX ( USD XXXX ) Due at pick-up. 
When I picked up the car on XX/XX/XXXX, the rate was confirmed at the counter. 
I returned the car on XX/XX/XXXX as planned and the estimate of charges said XXXX ( they charged me 5 days, instead of XXXX - the car rental was for 3 days but since I returned XXXX hours later than expected, they were supposed to charge me XXXX extra day, not XXXX ). XXXX is approximately USD {$350.00}. 
A few days later, to my surprise, I saw a charge in my Citi credit card for {$850.00}. I disputed the charge saying that I was overcharged {$500.00} and a couple of days later, Citi said that I am responsible for the charge. 
I contacted XXXX and they said the rate fluctuates and there is nothing in the contract that says that. They also overcharged me for the airport location service, which was estimated at XXXX and they charged me XXXX. 
I submitted another dispute to Citi and now they are charging me twice the amount of {$500.00}. 
In summary, I was supposed to pay about USD {$350.00} and now they are making liable for more than {$1300.00}. 
I have been trying to talk to someone from Citi with no luck. I called XXXX times and they couldn't transfer me to the dispute department. XXXX people gave me a phone number and that belongs to another company. 
I appreciate your help with this matter. 
Thanks, XXXX XXXX
